_doc: 100 zero-capital fringe/creation/iykyk income concepts with TESTABLE params for the Monte-Carlo stack harness (tools/fringe-mc.mjs). CREATION-positive: we build coins/agents/content/products/markets with real substance and they earn. Params are honest rough priors; the MC turns them into distributions, not promises. cat defaults in tools/gen-fringe.mjs.

concepts.name: Zora content coins
concepts.note: Every post is a coin; you earn 1% of all trades on it. Post consistently; AI helps ideate/produce.

concepts.name: Zora creator coin ($you)
concepts.note: Profile-level coin = your ticker; earns from all your content activity. Build an audience.

concepts.name: Zora attention markets
concepts.note: Create tradable markets around trends/memes/hashtags; first-mover on a narrative earns.

concepts.name: Farcaster/Base mini-coin drops
concepts.note: Coin a viral cast/frame; community trades it. Pairs with the Farcaster identity.

concepts.name: Meme-as-asset (your IP)
concepts.note: Create an original meme/character, coin it, build lore. Creation, not a copy.

concepts.name: Music coin (AI-assisted)
concepts.note: Coin AI-assisted tracks; fans trade. Ties to streaming royalties too.

concepts.name: Art-drop coins
concepts.note: Coin generative/AI art series with a release schedule; collectors trade.

concepts.name: Newsletter-to-coin
concepts.note: Tokenize a content series; readers hold/trade access + upside.

concepts.name: Faceless YouTube automation
concepts.note: AI scripts+voiceover+stock → ad revenue. Real example: ~$4.2k/mo at 3h/wk after sandbox.

concepts.name: Amazon KDP ebooks
concepts.note: AI-drafted niche non-fiction/low-content books; free upload, royalties forever.

concepts.name: Print-on-demand (Redbubble/Merch)
concepts.note: AI designs on free POD; passive per-sale royalty, no inventory.

concepts.name: AI music royalties (Suno→DSPs)
concepts.note: Generate tracks, distribute to Spotify/Apple; per-stream royalties + sync licensing.

concepts.name: Faceless short-form (TikTok/Reels/Shorts)
concepts.note: AI-edited shorts at volume; creator funds + affiliate + brand deals.

concepts.name: Stock media library
concepts.note: AI/photo stock to Adobe/Shutterstock; royalty per download, compounds with catalog size.

concepts.name: Content repurposing engine
concepts.note: One asset → tweets/Reddit/Pinterest/LinkedIn auto-distributed; multiplies any other content play.

concepts.name: AI narration / audiobook
concepts.note: Turn public-domain or your text into audiobooks; ACX/streaming royalties.

concepts.name: Niche blog + programmatic SEO
concepts.note: AI-generated programmatic pages at scale; display ads + affiliate after sandbox.

concepts.name: AI-generated coloring/activity books
concepts.note: Ultra-low-content KDP niche; tiny effort per title, stack many titles.

concepts.name: Micro-SaaS / tiny tool
concepts.note: AI-built single-purpose web tool on a subscription; one good one compounds.

concepts.name: Chrome / browser extension
concepts.note: Solve one annoyance; freemium or one-time. Free to publish.

concepts.name: Custom GPT / agent in a marketplace
concepts.note: Publish a specialized GPT/agent; marketplace rev-share or lead-gen.

concepts.name: Notion / template products
concepts.note: Sell templates (Notion/Sheets/Figma) on Gumroad; pure margin.

concepts.name: API wrapper / data API
concepts.note: Wrap a free data source into a paid API (RapidAPI); usage-billed.

concepts.name: Datasets for AI training
concepts.note: Curate/generate niche datasets; sell on HuggingFace/Kaggle/marketplaces.

concepts.name: Boilerplate / starter kit
concepts.note: Sell a dev boilerplate (the dashboard could be one); one-time per buyer.

concepts.name: Telegram/Discord bot SaaS
concepts.note: Community bot with a paid tier; recurring per server.

concepts.name: Prompt packs / AI workflows
concepts.note: Package proven prompts/workflows; low-ticket high-volume.

concepts.name: Figma/design asset packs
concepts.note: UI kits, icon sets; marketplaces pay royalties.

concepts.name: Deploy a fee-earning contract
concepts.note: Ship a useful contract (router/util) that takes a tiny fee on use.

concepts.name: Farcaster Frame / miniapp
concepts.note: Build a viral Frame; distribution is built-in, earns via tips/coins/sponsor.

concepts.name: NFT collection with real utility
concepts.note: Mint a collection that DOES something (access/tool); primary + royalty.

concepts.name: Create a prediction market
concepts.note: Spin up markets (Polymarket-style) on real questions; creator fee on volume.

concepts.name: Onchain mini-game
concepts.note: Deploy a simple onchain game; fees + token + airdrop eligibility.

concepts.name: Tokenize a real utility
concepts.note: Create a token that gates a real product/service you run. Substance-first.

concepts.name: Indexer/subgraph as a service
concepts.note: Host a subgraph others query; usage fees + ecosystem grants.

concepts.name: Onchain attestation/identity tool
concepts.note: Build an EAS-based attestation tool; grant-friendly + fee potential.

concepts.name: Liquidity-pool / vault product
concepts.note: Create a strategy vault; performance/mgmt fee (omnione edge as the product).

concepts.name: Launch an AI agent (Virtuals/Base)
concepts.note: Tokenize a REAL-substance agent (omnione analytics); fees + co-owned revenue. Needs $VIRTUAL.

concepts.name: Paid newsletter
concepts.note: Niche edge (quant/DePIN/airdrops) → subscriptions; AI drafts, you curate.

concepts.name: Cohort/online course
concepts.note: Package what you know into a course; evergreen sales.

concepts.name: Paid community / alpha group
concepts.note: Gated Discord/Telegram with real signal; recurring membership.

concepts.name: Grant-writing as a service
concepts.note: You now know the grant game → write grants for other builders for a cut.

concepts.name: Airdrop/farming guide product
concepts.note: Sell the playbook/tooling you built; info product + affiliate.

concepts.name: Consulting / fractional
concepts.note: Quant/AI/infra advisory; high $/hr, zero capital.

concepts.name: Sell research reports
concepts.note: Deep-dive reports (protocols/edges); one-to-many sales.

concepts.name: Bounty/grant intel service
concepts.note: Aggregate + alert on live grants/bounties (you have the registry) as a paid feed.

concepts.name: Farcaster account (PoH foundation)
concepts.note: Neynar proof-of-humanity that boosts sybil-resistance across ALL farming + its own rewards.

concepts.name: Affiliate / referral cascades
concepts.note: Refer exchanges/tools you use; recurring rev-share, compounds with audience.

concepts.name: X creator monetization
concepts.note: Ads rev-share + tips (note: post-to-earn bots banned; real content only).

concepts.name: Threads-to-product funnel
concepts.note: Build attention → funnel to your products/coins. Multiplies everything else.

concepts.name: Ambassador / KOL programs
concepts.note: Protocols pay for genuine technical content/advocacy; AI drafts, you ship.

concepts.name: Bounty-board content
concepts.note: Write/create for protocol content bounties (Layer3, etc.); per-piece pay.

concepts.name: Tip-driven open content
concepts.note: Publish genuinely useful threads/repos; tips + sponsorship inbound.

concepts.name: Curate-to-earn / InfoFi (Cookie.fun)
concepts.note: Surviving attention-economy reward for quality CT analysis.

concepts.name: Bandwidth DePIN stack
concepts.note: Honeygain/EarnApp/Pawns across every node; pennies but free + stacks on mining.

concepts.name: Airdrop DePIN nodes
concepts.note: Grass/Nodepay/Gradient = early-node token call-options on idle bandwidth.

concepts.name: CPU mining (idle compute)
concepts.note: Already live; XMR on idle cores, governor-protected.

concepts.name: Idle GPU/compute rental
concepts.note: Rent idle compute (io.net/Akash/Nosana/Salad) where ARM is supported.

concepts.name: Decentralized storage
concepts.note: Share disk on Filecoin/Storj/Crust; passive per-GB.

concepts.name: Run a public RPC / relay
concepts.note: Operate an RPC/relay/light-node; some pay or airdrop operators.

concepts.name: Oracle / keeper node
concepts.note: Run a keeper/oracle that earns gas+fee for upkeep calls.

concepts.name: Bandwidth for AI scraping (vetted)
concepts.note: Sell residential bandwidth to vetted networks; same as DePIN, more $/GB on residential.

concepts.name: Hotspot / wireless DePIN
concepts.note: Helium-style coverage if you have a device/location; passive.

concepts.name: Testnet node operator
concepts.note: Run validators/nodes the mesh can (Aleph Zero/Shardeum); merit-scored airdrops.

concepts.name: Points programs (Eigen/Rainbow)
concepts.note: Genuinely use protocols → pre-TGE points → token.

concepts.name: Retroactive protocol usage
concepts.note: Use new protocols early + real → retroactive snapshot rewards.

concepts.name: Quest sprints (Layer3/Galxe)
concepts.note: Consistent quest completion; XP → token + per-quest payouts.

concepts.name: Telegram tap-to-earn
concepts.note: Dropee/X-Empire ~5min/day; airdrop-shaped. Cap time or it is a drain.

concepts.name: Galxe/Zealy bounty quests
concepts.note: Task bounties + XP; small but steady, stack identities carefully.

concepts.name: Base ecosystem history
concepts.note: Build genuine onchain history pre Coinbase-L2 distribution.

concepts.name: Early-protocol LP/usage
concepts.note: Provide tiny liquidity / use new DEXs for points (small gas only).

concepts.name: Arbitrage bot (CEX/DEX)
concepts.note: Surface + (operator-executes) spreads; omnione opportunity engine feeds it.

concepts.name: Copy-trade / strategy vault
concepts.note: Your edge becomes the product; followers pay a cut.

concepts.name: Telegram trading bot (fee share)
concepts.note: Banana/Trojan-style bot UX; keep a % of routed volume. Build the legit version.

concepts.name: Liquidation / keeper bot
concepts.note: Run liquidation bots on lending protocols; earn the bounty.

concepts.name: AI freelancer agent
concepts.note: An agent that completes Algora/Upwork-style tasks; you supervise.

concepts.name: Sniper / new-listing bot
concepts.note: Auto-detect new listings/launches; first-mover (operator approves trades).

concepts.name: Yield auto-compounder
concepts.note: Auto-route idle stables to best organic yield (engine already ranks it).

concepts.name: Social listening → signal bot
concepts.note: Sell a sentiment/signal feed from mesh+omnione analytics.

concepts.name: Grant/bounty auto-applier
concepts.note: Agent drafts + queues grant/bounty applications at volume (you submit).

concepts.name: Audit contests (Code4rena/Sherlock)
concepts.note: Find vulns in scope; $5-30k active, single crit $10-50k. AI co-audits.

concepts.name: Immunefi bug bounties
concepts.note: Live-protocol bugs; $1k-$200k+. Lottery tail, huge.

concepts.name: Web2 bug bounties (HackerOne)
concepts.note: Broader surface; steadier small-medium payouts.

concepts.name: CTF prize pools
concepts.note: Competitive CTFs with cash; builds the audit skill too.

concepts.name: Code review bounties
concepts.note: Paid review on OSS/protocols; lower bar than full audit.

concepts.name: Secure-OSS fund (GitHub)
concepts.note: Funding for securing critical OSS; pairs with your repos.

concepts.name: LP fees (concentrated)
concepts.note: Provide tight-range liquidity; earn swap fees (needs some capital later).

concepts.name: Market-maker rebates
concepts.note: Maker rebates on venues that pay for liquidity/quotes.

concepts.name: Create + seed a prediction market
concepts.note: Author markets, earn creator fees on volume.

concepts.name: Validator commission (PoS)
concepts.note: Run/operate a validator; commission on delegated stake (legal on VPS).

concepts.name: Referral on MM/DEX volume
concepts.note: Rev-share on routed/maker volume you bring.

concepts.name: Liquidity bootstrapping for others
concepts.note: Provide LBP/launch services for new projects; service fee.

concepts.name: Skill-based crypto games
concepts.note: Chess/poker/strategy with real stakes; edge = your skill.

concepts.name: Game-asset flipping
concepts.note: Buy-low/sell-high in-game assets/NFTs you understand.

concepts.name: Web3 game testnet/airdrop
concepts.note: Play early game testnets for token allocations.

concepts.name: Tournament/ladder prizes
concepts.note: Competitive ladders with prize pools; skill-gated.

concepts.name: Sell omnione signals (feed)
concepts.note: Package the analytics as a paid signal/sentiment feed.

concepts.name: Mesh-health benchmark data
concepts.note: Anonymized hardware/health benchmarks as a dataset/API.

concepts.name: Onchain analytics dashboard (paid)
concepts.note: Productize a niche dashboard; subscription.

concepts.name: Backtest-as-a-service
concepts.note: Rent the backtest engine for strategies; usage-billed.

concepts.name: Build-in-public (public GitHub)
concepts.note: Unlocks Base Builder Rewards + Gitcoin + OP Retro + tea.xyz + Sponsors off ONE signal.

concepts.name: Basename + onchain identity
concepts.note: Required for Base rewards; boosts Builder Score + every onchain play.

concepts.name: Hot farming wallet + Farcaster PoH
concepts.note: Sybil-resistant identity that multiplies airdrop/points eligibility.

concepts.name: Reusable build (one repo, many entries)
concepts.note: One project entered across many hackathons/grants = leverage.
